title: Spatial Coordinate Convention (spatial:)
description: Schema for spatial coordinate information in Zarr. Properties use the 'spatial:' namespace prefix. This convention defines the relationship between array indices and spatial coordinates.

attributes.description: Zarr attributes containing convention metadata and spatial: prefixed properties

conventionMetadata.description: Spatial coordinate convention metadata object for use in zarr_conventions array

schema_url.description: URL to the JSON Schema definition for this convention

spec_url.description: URL to the full specification document

uuid.description: UUID that permanently identifies this convention

description.description: Brief description of the convention's purpose and usage

spatialAttributes.description: Spatial coordinate properties using spatial: key prefix

spatial:dimensions.description: Names of the two spatial (X/Y) dimensions, in row-major order (e.g., ["y", "x"]).

spatial:bbox.description: 2D bounding box in coordinate space: [xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax].

spatial:transform_type.description: Type of transformation used to map array indices to coordinates. Defaults to 'affine' if not specified. Currently defined types: 'affine'. Additional transform types may be defined in future versions (e.g., 'rpc', 'polynomial', 'lookup'). Custom types are allowed for extensibility.

spatial:transform.description: 2D affine transformation coefficients [a, b, c, d, e, f] mapping array indices to coordinates, where x = a*col_index + b*row_index + c and y = d*col_index + e*row_index + f. Used when transform_type is 'affine' (default).

spatial:shape.description: Shape of the two spatial dimensions [height, width], corresponding to [y, x].

spatial:registration.description: Grid cell registration type. 'node' (grid-registered) means cells are centered on coordinate points with footprints extending 1/2 cell width outside the range. 'pixel' (cell-registered) means cell boundaries align with coordinate points. Defaults to 'pixel' if not specified.

multiscales.description: When composing with multiscales convention, spatial: properties can be added to layout items

spatial:shape.description: Shape override for this resolution level [height, width]

spatial:transform.description: 2D affine transform override for this resolution level [a, b, c, d, e, f]
